name: Poached Cod in Saffron Broth
recipeIngredient: Celery (medium ribs), 1/2 cup, cut into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large Dutch oven, combine chicken broth and poaching liquid ingredients. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 45 minutes. Strain the liquid into a large skillet and discard solids. Continue simmering until reduced to 1 1/2 cups.
2. Place codfish steaks, leeks, bell pepper, and tomato in the liquid. Simmer gently until cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
3. Divide the poaching liquid and vegetables equally among four bowls. Cut the cod into large pieces and divide equally among the bowls.
